ai.title: Pentagon's ouster of Anthropic opens doors for small AI rivals

ai.title: New Aitech SOSA-Aligned U-C860X Mission Computers Deliver High-Performance Edge Processing and Accelerated AI/ML with Intel 14th Gen Core Ultra Processors
ai.description: **media[1006708]**CHATSWORTH, Calif., April 9, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Aitech, a global leader in AI-powered rugged embedded computing systems for defense and space applications, today announced the availability of two new single board computers (SBCs) for military and aerospace systems. The new U-C8600 and U-C8601 are the first Intel architecture rugged SBCs which integrate a hybrid multi-core X86 CPU with high-performance GPU and a Neural Processing Unit (NPU) to empower real-time AI for missions where every millisecond matters.

ai.title: Astranova Mobility Accelerates India's Clean Transportation with Fresh Funding

The funding will elevate its growth by 5x in 18 months, enhance AI capabilities, and further India's transition to sustainable transportation.
